'''âh-b-h-w''' ('''kahabhewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbear|unbear]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbear|unbear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-b-h-w
|-
! Lemma
| kahabhewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihabhewoko|thihabhewoko]] || [[word:jihabhewoko|jihabhewoko]] || [[word:shihabhewoko|shihabhewoko]] || [[word:kihabhewoko|kihabhewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
